Implements a Pebble app for profiling radial fill graphics operations, with build scripts and metadata.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Implements a Pebble app for profiling radial fill graphics operations in a window.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files to ignore in version control, including build files and waf lock files.
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the "fill_radial" app, including UUID, version, and target platforms.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with options for app and worker binaries.
